Items.Title: Iran captain Alireza Jahanbakhsh breaks silence on World Cup national anthem boos
Items.Description: Iran have been involved in two goalless draws at the 2026 FIFA World Cup, with the Iran national anthem boos continuing to be a talking point
Items.Author: Jarrod Castillo,Stephen Killen

Items.Title: Iran hold struggling Belgium to draw to keep World Cup hopes alive, but travel woes continue
Items.Description: Iran have put themselves in contention to advance from their group, all the while dealing with travel issues

Items.Title: Unbeaten Iran will go down in history - Ghalenoei
Items.Description: Iran coach Amir Ghalenoei believes his side's unbeaten start to the World Cup will be talked about for years to come given the disruption they have faced before and during the tournament.
